pages.title: BUILDING (Initial)
pages.text: $(li)PreFab is idle, waiting for configuration $(li)Configure faces and connect chests

pages.title: SIMULATING (Measuring)
pages.text: $(li)CM chunks are LOADED $(li)PreFab measures actual production $(li)Wait 30-60 seconds

pages.title: CACHED (Running Virtually)
pages.text: $(li)CM chunks are UNLOADED ← This is the performance gain. $(li)PreFab simulates production using math $(li)Add inputs → outputs appear based on cached rates

pages.title: HALTED (Problem Detected)
pages.text: $(li)Input ran out or output blocked $(li)CM chunks STAY unloaded $(li)Fix Overworld side (add inputs, clear outputs) $(li)Back to SIMULATING automatically (usually within 5 seconds)
